form_name: Petition Pursuant to G.L. c. 209A § 11 — Domesticated Animals

fields.name: division
fields.label: Court Division
fields.instructions: Enter the name of the court division where the case is filed, for example: Boston Municipal Court, District Court, Juvenile Court, Probate and Family Court, or Superior Court.

fields.name: docket_number
fields.label: Docket Number
fields.instructions: Enter the docket number assigned to your case. This is a unique identifier given by the court when the case was first filed. Format is typically a year followed by letters and numbers.

fields.name: plaintiff_name
fields.label: Plaintiff Name
fields.instructions: Enter the full legal name of the plaintiff — the person who filed the original case.

fields.name: defendant_name
fields.label: Defendant Name
fields.instructions: Enter the full legal name of the defendant — the person the original case was filed against.

fields.name: petitioner_name
fields.label: Petitioner Name
fields.instructions: Enter your full legal name. The petitioner is the person filing this petition — this may be the plaintiff or the defendant in the original case.

fields.name: animal_description
fields.label: Description of Domesticated Animals
fields.instructions: List each animal separately. For each animal include: the animal's name, species or breed, color or markings, and who currently owns or possesses it — petitioner, respondent, or a minor child.

fields.name: respondent_restrictions
fields.label: Respondent Name for Restrictions
fields.instructions: If you are asking the court to order the respondent to stay away from the animals, enter the respondent's full name here.

fields.name: animals_from_respondent
fields.label: Animals to be Restricted from Respondent
fields.instructions: List the animals you want the respondent to be ordered not to abuse, take, or interfere with.

fields.name: petitioner_custody_name
fields.label: Petitioner Name for Custody Request
fields.instructions: If you are asking the court to give you possession and care of the animals, enter your name here.

fields.name: animals_for_custody
fields.label: Animals Requested for Custody
fields.instructions: List the animals you are asking the court to place in your care and control.

fields.name: support_statement
fields.label: Statement in Support
fields.instructions: Describe in your own words why you are filing this petition. Explain the situation with the animals and why you need the court's protection. Be specific about any threats, abuse, or interference that has occurred or that you fear may occur.

fields.name: date
fields.label: Date
fields.instructions: Enter today's date in month/day/year format.
